text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start with a glass of water. After a quick shower, I have a light breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. I leave for work by 8:00, arriving at the office around 8:30. My work schedule is fairly consistent: I focus on tasks until noon, take a short lunch break, then continue until 5:00 PM. In the evening, I make time for exercise, either going for a jog or doing yoga at home. After dinner, I relax by reading or watching a show before bed around 10:30 PM. This routine helps me stay organized and healthy.
